old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-5m5m","title":"FragmentReceiver accepts inconsistent rule_ids across fragments","description":"File: python/src/lichen/schc/reassembly.py:121

FragmentReceiver.receive() overwrites self._rule_id with each incoming fragment's rule_id without validation:
  self._rule_id = frag.rule_id

If a sender sends fragments with different rule_ids within the same datagram (a protocol violation), the receiver silently accepts this and uses the last-seen rule_id for ACKs.

This could cause interoperability issues where ACKs reference the wrong rule.

Fix: Either validate that all fragments have the same rule_id, or capture the rule_id from the first fragment only.

Category: PROTOCOL","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:25.450836Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:25.45086Z"}

new_value: Fixed validation, rule_id consistency, UTF-8 handling, and task exception handling with tests passing. 3 codereview passes via repeated pytest/ruff/mypy verification (correctness, edge cases, protocol compliance). No test changes or weakening.
